name: Lake Texoma Public Launch
description: Large public boat ramp facility with multiple launch lanes and extensive parking. Popular for fishing and recreational boating on Lake Texoma.

name: Clear Lake Park Ramp
description: Well-maintained public boat ramp in Clear Lake area, excellent for saltwater and bay fishing. Parking available for vehicles with trailers.

name: Lake Okeechobee Public Access
description: Free public boat ramp providing access to one of Florida's largest freshwater lakes. Ideal for bass fishing and recreational boating.

name: California Delta Public Ramp
description: Public boat launch providing access to the California Delta waterways. Great for fishing, water skiing, and cruising.

name: Minnesota River Public Launch
description: Free public boat ramp on the Minnesota River. Perfect for kayaking, fishing, and recreational boating in the Minneapolis area.

name: Wisconsin Dells Public Ramp
description: Public boat launch on the Wisconsin River near Wisconsin Dells. Popular for tube floats, water sports, and scenic cruising.

name: Douglas Lake Public Access
description: Free public boat ramp providing access to scenic Douglas Lake. Excellent for fishing and recreational boating in East Tennessee.

name: Neuse River Public Ramp
description: Free public boat ramp on the Neuse River. Popular for fishing, crabbing, and recreational boating in Coastal North Carolina.

name: Indian Lake Public Launch
description: Large public boat ramp on scenic Indian Lake. Great for fishing, skiing, and family boating outings.

name: Lake Monroe Public Ramp
description: Free public boat launch on Indiana's largest man-made lake. Excellent for fishing, water sports, and scenic cruising.

name: Lake Union Public Launch
description: Popular public boat ramp in downtown Seattle on scenic Lake Union. Perfect for sailboating, fishing, and waterfront recreation.
